<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" type="device"><diagram id="p1" name="Page-1"><mxGraphModel dx="900" dy="600" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="880" pageHeight="380" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0"/><mxCell id="1" parent="0"/><mxCell id="CONN" value="Project connection (per project, BYO)
ApiManagement / CustomKeys
ModelGateway / RemoteA2A" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="40" width="320" height="90" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="AIGW" value="AI Gateway tab (Operate, Admin console)
resource-level, Foundry-managed
auto policies + per-project quotas" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="520" y="40" width="320" height="90" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="APIM" value="Azure API Management
load-balance, policies, quotas" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="300" y="210" width="280" height="70" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="F1" value="Foundry, East US 2 (P1)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="250" y="320" width="170" height="46" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="F2" value="Foundry, Sweden Central (P2)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="460" y="320" width="200" height="46" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e1" value="you set URL + auth; you own policy" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="CONN" target="APIM"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e2" value="Foundry enrolls projects; auto policy" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="AIGW" target="APIM"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e3" value="priority LB" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="APIM" target="F1"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="e4" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="APIM" target="F2"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell></root></mxGraphModel></diagram></mxfile>
svg.text: you set URL + auth · you own policy
